title: Accessible Styling
description: Fix accessibility issues in a form by adding focus-visible outlines, respecting prefers-reduced-motion, and ensuring sufficient color contrast
html: Fields marked with * are required

validationRules.message: Input font size should be 16px (prevents zoom on mobile)
Note text should use a darker gray (#6c757d) for WCAG contrast compliance

hints.text: Never remove outline without providing an alternative focus indicator. Use :focus-visible instead of :focus. Respect prefers-reduced-motion.
Remove 'outline: none', add :focus-visible styles, wrap animation in @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce), and change note color to #6c757d for 4.5:1 contrast.
Add focus-visible outlines, reduce-motion media query to disable animation, and fix contrast.
